basic_details.job_title: RARI Ahmedabad Senior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.organization_name: Regional Ayurveda Research Institute, Ahmedabad (RARI Ahmedabad)
basic_details.short_information: Regional Ayurveda Research Institute, Ahmedabad (RARI Ahmedabad) Senior Research Fellow (Ay.) Notification 2026 has been released on 02 March 2026 on the official website. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the RARI Ahmedabad Senior Research Fellow (Ay.) Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per Central Govt. rules for SC/ST/OBC/PH.

qualification.education_qualification: B.A.M.S. Degree from any Recognized University
qualification.details: Senior Research Fellow (Ay.): B.A.M.S. Degree from any Recognized University. Preference to Degree/Diploma/Certificate in Yoga/Swasthavritta, research experience in AYUSH/ICMR/DST funded Yoga projects, skills in drafting scientific documents, publications in peer-reviewed journals, knowledge of MS Office.

salary_details.details: Rs. 42000 Per Month (Plus HRA as per rules)

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for RARI Ahmedabad Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Senior Research Fellow (Ay.) position at Regional Ayurveda Research Institute, Ahmedabad is scheduled for 19th June 2026. Candidates should report between 09:00 AM and 11:00 AM on this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the eligibility criteria for the Senior Research Fellow (Ay.) post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a B.A.M.S. Degree from a recognized university. Preference will be given to those with a Degree/Diploma/Certificate in Yoga/Swasthavritta, research experience in AYUSH/ICMR/DST funded Yoga projects, and good scientific documentation skills.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Senior Research Fellow (Ay.) position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Senior Research Fellow (Ay.) post is 35 years as of 1st June 2026. Age relaxation will be provided as per Central Government rules for SC/ST/OBC/PH candidates.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Senior Research Fellow (Ay.) post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 42,000/- per month, along with House Rent Allowance (HRA) as per applicable rules.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Senior Research Fellow (Ay.) post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Senior Research Fellow (Ay.) position at the Regional Ayurveda Research Institute, Ahmedabad.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: This recruitment is being conducted through a Walk-in Interview. Candidates do not need to apply online beforehand; they can directly attend the interview with the required documents.

faq.question: Q7. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, including ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if applicable), category certificates (if applicable), and passport-size photographs. A set of self-attested photocopies of these documents is also required.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for the Senior Research Fellow (Ay.) post?
faq.answer: The selection process may include a written test, depending on the number of eligible candidates, followed by an interview. Candidates are advised to be prepared for both.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the Regional Ayurveda Research Institute, Ahmedabad located?
faq.answer: The Regional Ayurveda Research Institute, Ahmedabad is located in Ahmedabad, Gujarat, with the pincode 380004. The exact venue details will be available in the official notification.
